programme.title: Love, Romance & Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts? Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango
programme.desc: A no-nonsense detective must reluctantly team up with a charismatic British dance star in order to solve a murder. Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Proposing Murder
programme.desc: Tess dives into Logan's murder investigation of her friend who was about to propose with her help. As she grows closer to the truth, she fears it could ruin everyone's happily ever after. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: His & Hers
programme.desc: Lawyers Mark and Dana are the perfect married couple until they find themselves on opposite sides of a highly public divorce case involving a warring reality show couple. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former "Most Eligible Bachelor" how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: Sarah, a wedding planner in New York, is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be Sarah's ex.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: With a case of writer's block, a children's author escapes to small town Mitford for a change of scenery. She soon finds the heart and soul of the southern town in a priest as they work together to care for a young boy.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara, a magazine writer, who gets burned by her boyfriend on New Years' Eve, decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she hopes a ski getaway with her best friend will spark inspiration.

programme.title: Frozen in Love
programme.desc: When struggling bookstore owner Mary and the bad boy of professional hockey, Adam, are teamed together to help facilitate an image makeover for the other, they soon realize that opposites attract.

programme.title: Harvest Love
programme.desc: A widowed surgeon visits her family's pear orchard in hopes of reconnecting with her distant son. She starts to fall for the farm manager, Will, who is growing a new hybrid pear, and teaches her the importance of her heritage.

programme.title: Sun, Sand & Romance
programme.desc: Kate is a driven publishing exec visiting a summer resort with her boyfriend Eric. There she runs into Shep, an old high school friend and fellow camp counselor, who is now the Activities Director.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick have no luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: Tess, is going to Chicago for the weekend to be the maid of honor at her best friend's wedding. Her boyfriend, Dex, backs out of the trip at the last minute, leaving Tess in the hands of the groom's best man, Michael.

programme.title: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her all-important 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her birthday wish: a glimpse into her future - which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined for herself.

programme.title: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A chef makes a deal with a frozen food executive in order to save his restaurant. Stars Autumn Reeser, Kavan Smith, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: Big city girls Julia and her best friend Sydney take a trip to a dude ranch in Wyoming for a fun weekend getaway, but after a brawl at the local bar, the girls are sentenced to stay in town and perform community service.

programme.title: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her "boyfriend" for the week.

programme.title: A Season to Blossom
programme.desc: A drifting aspiring writer returns to sell her late grandmother's bookstore, but its traditions - and her childhood crush - helps her rediscover her voice, her roots, and a love worth staying for. Stars Emily Tennant, Carlo Marks.

programme.title: Branching Out
programme.desc: To help build a family tree, single mom Amelia tracks down her daughter's biological father. It becomes a journey of trust, love, and discovering the meaning of family. Stars Sarah Drew, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: My Argentine Heart
programme.desc: Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when outside forces threaten the ranch the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: Small-town baker, Kelly, gets a big surprise when she is invited to compete on a Valentine's Day baking show in New York City - and an even bigger surprise when she runs into her ex-fiance. Stars Erin Cahill, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Savoring Paris
programme.desc: Disillusioned with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris where she navigates love, self-discovery and cheese amidst the enchanting backdrop of The City of Love. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz and Stanley Weber.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land that is perfect for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment and win over a handsome local. Starring JoAnna Garcia Swisher and Allen Leech.

programme.title: A Machu Picchu Proposal
programme.desc: Katie helps plan her brother's proposal atop Machu Picchu. When the proposal is ruined by spontaneous Chef Carlos, Katie enlists Carlos to help her find the most romantic spot in all of Peru. Stars Rhiannon Fish and Alec Santos.

programme.title: A Melbourne Match
programme.desc: Georgie, a travel writer, travels to Melbourne for an assignment where she meets Zach, an ex-Australian footballer who agrees to be her tour guide and shows her that there's more to life than work. Stars Mallory Jansen, Ryan Corr.

programme.title: A Little Park Music
programme.desc: When a piano appears in the park gazebo, interfering with important work, city manager Allie joins forces with rookie cop Ryan to remove it, only to find both music and love are hard to resist. Stars Laci J Mailey, Beau Mirchoff.

programme.title: Very, Very, Valentine
programme.desc: Helen, a shy florist, meets the perfect man at a Valentine's Masquerade Ball. So, she enlists the help of her best friend Henry to track him down only to find that her perfect man may already be right in front of her.

programme.title: Sweeter Than Chocolate
programme.desc: A local chocolatier is rumored to have the secret recipe to finding true love on February 14th, drawing in a TV reporter to investigate. Stars Eloise Mumford, Dan Jeannotte, Brenda Strong.

programme.title: The Real West
programme.desc: A family vacation to a working Ranch introduces Professor Rebecca to Jake West. Rebecca is a widow chasing tenure and Jake is a handsome cowboy who never settled down. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Lucas Bryant and James Denton.

programme.title: To Philly with Love
programme.desc: A teacher and an archivist decode Revolutionary War-era love letters, taking them on a thrilling journey through Philadelphia where they uncover history and discover a love story of their own. Stars Rebecca Dalton, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date. Stars Italia Ricci, Chad Michael Murray, & Jack Turner.

programme.title: The Royal We
programme.desc: When her older sister elopes with a non-royal, Princess Bea who has lived her life away from her royal duties must now step in and honor the arranged marriage to a small kingdom prince. Stars Mallory Jansen, Charlie Carrick.

programme.title: Falling Together
programme.desc: Natalie tries to bring feuding neighbors together in her new condo building. Her unexpected ally is the building's super who prefers to avoid getting involved. Stars Ashley Williams, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Right in Front of Me
programme.desc: Carly has a second chance at romance with her college crush but is unable to impress him until her new friend Nick starts giving her advice. Soon she learns who the right man for her really is. Stars Janel Parrish, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: A Royal Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Princess Amelia of Bundbury travels across America to explore a budding romance with an artist, only to fall in love with her bodyguard Grady. Stars Philippa Northeast, Brant Daugherty.

programme.title: Love on the Amazon
programme.desc: Claire travels to Brazil and hires Danny, a riverboat captain, to help her deliver an important message for her sister Amelia, a marine biologist studying pink dolphins on the Amazon River. Stars Jaicy Elliot, Rafael de la Fuente.

programme.title: An Alpine Holiday
programme.desc: Two vastly different sisters follow their late grandparent's steps and experience everything the Alps has to offer- including romance. Starring Ashley Williams, Laci J. Mailey, and Julien Samani.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Run
programme.desc: Self-described bookworm Avery is paired with retired hockey star Wes to compete in a holiday race across America. The team struggles through themed challenges until romance runs its course. Stars Ashley Williams, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Baby
programme.desc: A couple is surprised when a baby is mysteriously dropped off on their doorstep, forcing them to navigate a new terrain in their relationship and careers. Stars Ali Liebert , Katherine Barrell, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Keller Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Siblings Dylan, Cal, and Emory are at a crossroads in their lives and have drifted apart. To help, their parents plan a family Christmas river cruise visiting Germany and Austria. Stars Jonathan Bennett, Brandon Routh, Eden Sher.

programme.title: The Search for Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bennett and judge Melissa Peterman kick off the hunt for Hallmark's next leading man as ten new hunks reinvent Santa, then brave a ski-slope meet-cute with Janel Parrish- where spills steal the scene.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Leah's 30th birthday is on Christmas Eve, the same day as her brother's wedding. Her childhood crush is back in town for the wedding and he is determined to make sure her birthday is celebrated. Stars Emily Osment, Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: When Anna offers a stranded mother and son shelter in a blizzard, she learns that they are the Royal Family of Galwick. Anna shows the Prince how they do Christmas in her hometown of Kentsbury. Stars Laura Osnes and Aaron Tveit.

programme.title: Time for Him to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Four days before Christmas, Elizabeth receives a voicemail from a number she doesn't recognize. On the message, a man she doesn't know makes one final plea to the love of his life. Holland Roden, Tyler Hynes, Tenille Townes.

programme.title: Holiday Touchdown: A Bills Love Story (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Lifelong Bills fans Morgan and Gabe find love in Buffalo at Christmas. Holland Roden, Matthew Daddario, and Joe Pantoliano.

programme.title: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: With a residency at a top hospital and a boyfriend she adores, Lauren appears to have her entire life figured out. But when she loses both her job and her beau on the same day, Lauren reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's Maggie's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Single mom Maggie is trying to be devoted to son Jordan while having a career. Jordan meets Casey, a tutor. They bond. What he wishes most is for his mom to find happiness and love at Christmas. Stars Jill Wagner, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Debbie Macomber's Joyful Mrs. Miracle
programme.desc: Mrs. Miracle uses Christmas magic to reunite three siblings who must decide who will inherit the family's real estate empire following their grandmother's passing. Stars Rachel Boston, Pascal Lamothe-Kipnes, and Tanner Novlan.

programme.title: Miracle in Bethlehem, PA
programme.desc: A single woman with a newly adopted baby gets stuck in Bethlehem, PA. With no room at the Inn she's forced to stay with a stranger who turns out to be the miracle she needed. Starring Laura Vandervoort and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Melt My Heart This Christmas
programme.desc: Holly, a passionate glassblower, secretly displays her own art under a pseudonym while assisting a legendary glassblower to help Jack at a Christmas Fair. Starring Laura Vandervoort and Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: A Blue Ridge Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: Hotel manager Willow returns to her stunning Virginia hometown to help her sister plan a Christmas wedding at the inn her family once owned. She must work with current owner and single dad David, who wants to let go of the past.

programme.title: Time for You to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: When Katherine returns home after her husband passed, she meets a veteran who is on his own holiday journey. As Christmas nears, they learn of a bond that may be the miracle they need. Stars Alison Sweeney, Lucas Bryant.

programme.title: Christmas at the Catnip Café
programme.desc: After inheriting part ownership of a cat cafe, Olivia must spend the weeks leading up to Christmas working there to try and convince veterinarian Ben to sell but manages to find love instead. Staring Erin Cahill and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: A Godwink Christmas
programme.desc: Through a series of coincidences, known as Godwinks, Paula and Gery find their paths keep crossing at Christmas on Martha's Vineyard, as if they are destined for each other. Stars Kathy Lee Gifford, Kimberly Sustad, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Following Yonder Star
programme.desc: A former television star waits out a scandal in Vermont. She becomes close with the innkeeper and his daughter while she helps him direct the local children's Christmas pageant. Stars Brooke D'Orsay and John Brotherton.

programme.title: A Maple Valley Christmas
programme.desc: Rancher Erica has spent her whole life working the family farm with her mother and sister. When Aaron arrives and disrupts her plans, she starts to question what it is she actually wants. Starring Peyton List and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Terminal Descent
programme.desc: When Tess prepares for a crossword challenge against a super computer, the engineer behind it is murdered, spurring her and Logan to seek answers before they become the next victims. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Riddle Me Dead
programme.desc: Tess gets invited to be a part of a popular game show, but when the host is unexpectedly murdered, she and Detective Logan O'Connor seek to uncover who was behind it all. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jennifer Shannon has an eye for antiques and a mind for solving mysteries. When she buys a storage unit at auction, she has no idea she's opening the door to murder, and realizes the killer is after something in the storage unit.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Deadly Room
programme.desc: Jennifer's real-estate agent pal dies while trying to negate rumors about a home she's selling. The police believe there was no foul play, but Jennifer suspects that her friend was killed after she researches other deaths.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: In Jennifer Shannon's latest quest, she stumbles upon a 30 year-old cold case when she comes across a vintage wedding dress containing a clue. As Jenn tracks down the owner, she finds that the Groom mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: When Jenn's old pal Sandra becomes the prime suspect in a murder case, it'll be up to her to discover who done it before time runs out. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange and Steve Bacic.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Abby Knight is the proud owner of her hometown flower shop, but a SUV just rammed her vintage Corvette in a hit-and-run. She's determined to track down the driver, but the trail turns deadly.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Snipped in the Bud
programme.desc: When a bouquet from her shop is found at the murder scene of a professor and former courtroom adversary of Abby Knight, a former attorney-turned-small-town-florist, she finds herself as the main suspect. Stars Brooke Shields.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Dearly Depotted
programme.desc: Abby Knight, ex-lawyer and crime buff, and the owner of Bloomers Flower Shop, is having a week to be reckoned with. A bridesmaid at her drama queen cousin's wedding, Abby ends having to find out who murdered a wedding crasher.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed for Murder
programme.desc: Shannon Hammer, owner of Hammer Construction Company, is an expert in Victorian home restoration. Through her renovations she will find clues to uncover a house's secret past and in turn become an unlikely sleuth.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Concrete Evidence
programme.desc: When Mac first moved to Lighthouse Cove, he bought the historic lighthouse mansion that the town is named after. During renovation demolition, the bones of a teenage girl were discovered. Stars Jewel and Colin Ferguson.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: Shannon Hughes has taken on a charity project renovating an old Victorian mansion. When a local banker is found murdered inside, Shannon must dust off the clues and cement the truth before her renovation becomes a demolition.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Riddled with Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief, and also... a murderer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Ships in the Night: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When an art gallery robbery leads to the death of the contemptible gallery manager, former Boston detective teams up with local doctor--and old flame-- to catch the killer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Poisoned in Paradise: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When a local waitress is found dead on the beach and a mysterious deposit appears in Zee's bank account, Martha's Vineyard proves to be all but the simple, scenic life Jeff Jackson was after. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Mystery Island: Pilot
programme.desc: When a visit to a mystery-themed resort goes wrong, a local detective and a vacationing British criminal psychiatrist team up to solve a real murder. Starring Elizabeth Henstridge, Charlie Weber.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Murder in G Major
programme.desc: A new teacher at an Irish prep school is shocked to find a ghost haunting her house. She decides to help solve his murder in the hopes that it will allow him to move on. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Buried at C
programme.desc: Our favorite music teacher Gethsemane is back again along with her trusted ghost friend Eamon to solve the unexplained death of a sea captain. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, and Marco Grazzini.
